intro: Nesaea recta is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly found in tropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which may aid in wound healing and the management of certain infections. The bioactive constituents of Nesaea recta include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other secondary metabolites that contribute to its medicinal properties. Nesaea recta is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms of fever and respiratory infections.
